message:
fix(widgets): prevent panic on empty list selection and virtualized scroll underflow

List: when items is empty and state.selected is Some, set it to None
instead of computing items.len() - 1 which panics on subtract-with-
overflow at zero.

Virtualized: use saturating_sub in scroll_to_bottom() and is_at_bottom()
to prevent underflow when the viewport is taller than the content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
